name: Kindergarten Photography & Film — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for photo stories, sequence, consent, and sharing safely. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with photo stories, sequence, consent, and sharing safely.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about photo stories, sequence, consent, and sharing safely through a close look at photo stories, sequence, consent, and sharing safely.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about photo stories, sequence, consent, and sharing safely through a guided practice with photo stories, sequence, consent, and sharing safely.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about photo stories, sequence, consent, and sharing safely through a small creation or demonstration about photo stories, sequence, consent, and sharing safely.

I can use words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate my thinking.

activities.title: A close look at photo stories, sequence, consent, and sharing safely
activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at photo stories, sequence, consent, and sharing safely, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.

successCriteria: The learner participates safely and respectfully in photo stories, sequence, consent, and sharing safely.
The learner communicates one observation, choice, or question using speech, drawing, movement, or a supported response.
